source_citation: Yu, Collavo, Zheng, Owen, Sattin & Powles 2007, Plant Physiol 145(2):547-558
notes: Confirmed directly from paper's own Table IV: EF538937 (susceptible VLR1 2002 bulk) is the wild-type reference; EF538939 (resistant H1/10) differs at exactly one position (raw fragment position 461 = full-length AJ310767 position 2088, C->R), matching Table IV's stated SNP exactly. EF538940 (resistant H1/19) is an independent clone with the identical single clean substitution. EF538941-943 also carry the mutation but with additional ambiguous/background positions (X calls), not used as the primary pair. Numbering: black-grass (AJ310767)-native position 2088 maps to 1UYS (yeast) position 2014 (CORRECTED - an earlier pass said 2013; caught via cross-check against an independent parallel analysis of this same repo, confirmed by residue identity: 1UYS position 2014 is MSE/selenomethionine=Met, matching Delye et al. 2005's Table III statement that yeast has Met at this position, while 2013 is Glu, which does not match). This falls in a locally ambiguous stretch - Delye et al. 2005's own text describes positions 2027-2096 as a 'more variable region' - and the alignment places a 2-residue gap spanning yeast positions 2012-2014, all three of which flank or contain a Met; 2012 and 2014 are both Met and give near-identical distance/SASA profiles, so the qualitative conclusion is robust regardless of which exact position is the true homolog. All 12 of Delye et al. 2005's own explicitly-stated yeast<->black-grass anchor correspondences matched exactly (12/12) at less ambiguous, non-indel-adjacent positions. Mechanism class not yet resolved from a structural/kinetic paper analogous to Dayan 2010 for PPO - flagged open per this project's standard (do not infer).
